prompt: I need a robots.txt for our SaaS app at https://appflow.io. Public marketing pages should be crawlable, but /app/, /api/, /auth/, and /admin/ must be blocked. I also want to let GPTBot and ClaudeBot crawl our /blog/ and /docs/ sections but block them from everything else. Block AhrefsBot and SemrushBot entirely — they're hammering our server. Oh, and we have staging at staging.appflow.io that should block all bots. Generate this as a TanStack Start API route that switches behavior based on environment.
